name: space-cart-logistics
title: Space Cart Logistics
author: gofarovich
description: Tile-sized rails and externally-routed carts (OHT/AMHS-style), simulated entirely in Lua. Milestone 7: cart cargo (quality = slots) and dock skeleton (directional 1x1 grabs carts off straight rail, arm follows the approaching cart), on top of directional routing conditions, read-next, intersection arbitration and snake-deque convoys.
